title: Popover, Dialog & Event Detail Accessibility
description: Fix high-severity aria issues in SaveSearchPopover (missing aria-modal and aria-labelledby), add focus trapping to DetailPanel DiscardDialog, wire aria-describedby on DiscardDialog description text, add aria-labelledby to ShortcutHelp dialog, add aria-label to CalendarGrid event list containers, add accessible names to ApplicationRowActions icon-only buttons, and add aria-hidden to CompanyLogo decorative images.

userStories.title: Add aria-modal and aria-labelledby to SaveSearchPopover
userStories.description: SaveSearchPopover.jsx renders a popover/dialog for saving searches but is missing aria-modal='true' and aria-labelledby linking to its heading. Without these, screen readers do not treat it as a modal and may read content behind it. Add role='dialog', aria-modal='true', and aria-labelledby pointing to the popover heading's id.
acceptanceCriteria: SaveSearchPopover.jsx dialog container has aria-modal='true'
The dialog has aria-labelledby pointing to its title/heading element's id
The title element has a matching id attribute
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add focus trap to DetailPanel DiscardDialog
userStories.description: DetailPanel.jsx DiscardDialog is a confirmation modal that appears when discarding unsaved changes. It lacks focus trapping — keyboard users can Tab outside the dialog while it is open. Implement focus trapping so Tab and Shift+Tab cycle only within the dialog. Return focus to the triggering element when the dialog closes.
acceptanceCriteria: DetailPanel.jsx DiscardDialog traps focus — Tab and Shift+Tab stay within the dialog while it is open
When the dialog closes (confirm or cancel), focus returns to the element that triggered it
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-describedby to DetailPanel DiscardDialog description
userStories.description: DetailPanel.jsx DiscardDialog has aria-labelledby on the dialog element but the description text ('Your changes will be lost.' or similar) is not linked via aria-describedby. Add id='discard-dialog-description' to the description paragraph and aria-describedby='discard-dialog-description' to the dialog element.
acceptanceCriteria: DetailPanel.jsx DiscardDialog description paragraph has id='discard-dialog-description'
The dialog element has aria-describedby='discard-dialog-description'
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-labelledby to ShortcutHelp dialog
userStories.description: ShortcutHelp.jsx uses a Dialog component that has a DialogTitle (line ~41) but the dialog container may not be wired with aria-labelledby pointing to the title. Ensure the dialog element has aria-labelledby referencing the DialogTitle's id so screen readers announce the dialog name when it opens.
acceptanceCriteria: ShortcutHelp.jsx dialog container has aria-labelledby pointing to the DialogTitle element's id
The DialogTitle has a matching id attribute
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-label to CalendarGrid day event list containers
userStories.description: CalendarGrid.jsx renders a div containing event chips for each day with no aria-label. Screen reader users navigating the calendar cannot tell which day's events they are in. Add aria-label='Events for {formatted date}' to each day's event container div.
acceptanceCriteria: CalendarGrid.jsx event container div has aria-label='Events for {date}' where {date} is the formatted day date
The label changes for each day cell
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-labels to ApplicationRowActions icon-only buttons
userStories.description: ApplicationRowActions.jsx renders icon-only action buttons (edit, delete, view, etc.) for each application row. Icon-only buttons with no visible text must have aria-label attributes for screen reader users. Add descriptive aria-label to each icon-only button.
acceptanceCriteria: Each icon-only button in ApplicationRowActions.jsx has a descriptive aria-label (e.g. 'Edit application', 'Delete application', 'View details')
Icons within the buttons have aria-hidden='true'
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-hidden to CompanyLogo decorative images
userStories.description: CompanyLogo.jsx renders company logo images that are decorative (the company name is conveyed elsewhere in the application card or row). Ensure logo img elements have either alt='' (empty alt for decorative images) or aria-hidden='true' to prevent screen readers from announcing them.
acceptanceCriteria: CompanyLogo.jsx img elements have alt='' (empty alt) or aria-hidden='true'
If a fallback initial/placeholder is shown, it also has aria-hidden='true' or empty alt
Build passes with no errors

userStories.title: Add aria-live region to DuplicateWarning component
userStories.description: DuplicateWarning.jsx appears dynamically when a duplicate application is detected (typically in a form flow). Dynamic content that appears without user action should be announced to screen readers. Add role='alert' or aria-live='polite' to the DuplicateWarning container so screen readers announce when a duplicate is detected.
acceptanceCriteria: DuplicateWarning.jsx container has role='alert' (or aria-live='polite' aria-atomic='true')
Build passes with no errors
